The primary endpoint was tested at H0: mean maximum CRP decline = 0 versus H1: mean decline > 0 (one-sided). Protocol Section 12.4 prespecified Bonferroni adjustment (α = 0.025 per test) for two planned Cohort 1 tests; only the low-dose one-sample test was performed because the high-dose arm did not enroll, so the primary analysis used α = 0.05. `r evaluable_efficacy_n` of `r planned_evaluable_n` planned evaluable patients were analyzed; post-hoc power at α = 0.05 was approximately `r fmt_num(posthoc_power_alpha_05_pct, 0)`%.
